## Checklist

- [ ] **Tokens only** — no new raw hex / `rgb()` in product UI (`web/src`); use semantic Tailwind tokens or `globals.css` variables.
- [ ] **A11y spot-check** — focus visible for new interactive controls; labels / `aria-*` for icon-only buttons and live regions where state changes off-screen.
- [ ] **Blueprint** — if shipping UI or GTM-relevant behavior, note the relevant section or phase in `docs/BLUEPRINT.md` when applicable.
